sections.sectionTitle: Israel-te in Bashan kumpi Og Zo

verses.text: “Tua ciangin eite kihei-in Bashan lamah i paito a, Bashan kumpipa Og leh ama mite khempeuh Edrei-ah eite a do dingin hong kuankhia hi

Ahih hangin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Amah kihta kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah leh a mite khempeuh leh a leitang nangma khutsungah kong pia khinzo hi. Heshbon-ah a teng Amor kumpipa Sihon na bawl bangin ama tungah na bawl ding hi,’ hong ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Topa i Pasian in eite' khutsungah Bashan kumpipa Og leh a mite khempeuh zong hong pia a, ama-a' dingin mi khat beek a suakta nawnlo dingin i vatmai hi
Tua hunin a khuapite khempeuh uh i la a, amau' kiang pan i lakloh khuapi khat zong omlo hi. Tua banga i lakte pen Bashan gama Og kumpi gamsung, Argob gambup, khuapi sawmgukte ahi hi
Kulhpi-a ki-umlo khuaneu tampite simloh, hih khuapite khempeuh kulh sangpi, kongpi leh sikzawlte tawh a muan'huai takin a kibawl ahi hi
Heshbon kumpipa Sihon i bawl bangin amaute i susiamang a, a khuapi khempeuh, papi, nupi, leh naupangte i susia hi
Ahih hangin a ganhing khempeuh leh khuapi sunga van kinusiate i la hi
“Tua ahih ciangin tua hun laitakin, Jordan galkhata om Amor kumpi nihte' khutsung pan, Arnon kuam panin Hermon Mual dong(Sidon mite in Hermon pen Sirion ci a, Amor mite in Senir ci uh hi
mualzang khuapite khempeuh leh Gilead gam khempeuh leh Bashan gam khempeuh, Salekah leh Edrei dong, Bashan-a om Og kumpi gam khuapite i la hi

(Bang hang hiam cih leh Bashan kumpipa Og bek Refaim gamsungah a omlai ahi hi. Ama lupna a han pen suang han hi a, Ammon mite' khuapi Rabbah-ah tua han omlai hilo ahi hiam? Tua han a sauna pi sawmleli dektak hi a, a zaina pi guk ahi hi.)

sections.sectionTitle: Reuben, Gad, leh Manasseh , Jordan Nisuahna lamah Teng

verses.text: “Tua hunin hih leitang i luah ciangin, Reuben mite leh Gad mite tungah Arnon kuam monga a om Aroer pan leh Gilead mualtung gam kimkhat a khuapite tawh ka pia hi
Gilead gam a omlai teng leh Argob gam khempeuh ahi, Og kumpi gam, Bashan gam khempeuh, Manasseh minam kimkhatte tungah ka pia hi. (Bashan gam buppi pen Refaim leitang kici hi
Manasseh mi Jair in Bashan kici Argob gam khempeuh, Geshur mite leh Maakath mite' gamgi dong la a, tua sunga khuaneu minte ama min tamsakin tuni donga a kip Havvothjair a phuak hi
“Makhir tungah Gilead ka pia a
Reuben mite leh Gad mite tungah Gilead panin Arnon kuam dong, gamgi dingin a kuam laita, Ammon mite' gamgi ahi Jabbok gun dong tawh ka pia hi
Arabah gam zong, a gamgi dingin Jordan tawh, Khinnereth pan nisuahna lama om Pisgah mualpang nuai-a Ci Tuipi ahi Arabah tuipi ciangdong amaute ka pia hi
“Tua hunin note thu kong pia a, ‘ Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun hih leitang hong piazo hi. Na galhang mite khempeuh uh galhiam tawh kithawi-in Israel mi na sanggamte uh mai-ah va kuan ding hi
Ahih hangin na zite, na taneute, leh na ganhingte uh (ganhing tampi na neih uh ka thei hi) note kong piaksa khuapite-ah om ding uh a

Topa in note hong piak bangin na sanggamte uh tungah lungsim tawlngakna pia-in, Topa na Pasian un Jordan galkhatah amaute a piak leitang amaute in zong a luah matengun na huh ding uh hi. Tua ciangin note kong piaksa ahi na neihsa ciat uhah note khempeuh na ciah ding uh hi,’ kong ci hi

“Tua hun laitakin Joshua thu ka pia a, ‘ Topa na Pasian in hih kumpi nihte' tungah a bawlte khempeuh na mit in mu khin a, na nawk lai ding kumpi gam khempeuh tungah zong Topa in tua mah bangin hih ding hi
Amaute na kihta kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang-a' dinga hong dosakpa pen Topa na Pasian ahi hi,’ ka ci hi.
“Tua hunin keimah in Topa' tungah ka thum a

‘Topa Pasian aw, na liatna leh na thahatnate na nasempa' tungah lah ding a hong kipan pan bek na hi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh vantung hita leh leitungah hita leh nangma hih bangin tua bang nasep leh a vanglian gamtatna a hih thei bang pasian om ahi hiam
Kei hong paisak in la, Jordan galkhata om gam hoih, tua mualtung gam hoih leh Lebanon hong musak in, ci-in kong thum hi,’ ka ci hi
“Ahih hangin note' hangin kei' tungah Topa heh a, ka thunget hong pialo hi. Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Phazo hi; hih thu kei kiangah hong gen nawn kei in
Pisgah mual dawnah paito in la, nitumna lam, leilu lam, leitaw lam, leh nisuahna lamah khuadakto in la, na mit tawh gal et in; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in hih Jordan na kantan kei ding hi
Ahih hangin Joshua thu pia in la, hanthawnin thakhauhsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite' mai-ah amah pai ding a, nangmah in na muh ding leitang amaute luahsak ding hi,’ hong ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Bethpeor gala kuam sungah i taam lai hi.
